markdown:
#  Payor Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Bulk Edit Funding Accounts 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Payments Settings** ![Icon Settings Gear Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/82bcdf4b273dbe83270f33ddcd8f6e9b/37bc3808aa1038ff0321c983ba1c5469/icon-settings-gear-android.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon. This opens the Payments Settings page. The Funding Accounts page is active by default.
  3. Click **Project Controls**.
  4. In the table, do one of the following:
     * _To select one or more projects_ , mark the checkbox(es) to the desired projects. 
     * _To select all projects_ , mark the checkbox in the **Project** column header.
  5. Click **Edit Bank Account** and choose an option from the drop-down list. 
#####  Tips
     * **Looking for a specific account?** Start typing the account nickname in the **Search** box to narrow the accounts in the list.
     * **Want to change the selected 'Pay' status?** You can change both settings in the same action. To learn more, see [Enable or Disable Procore Pay on Your Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/enable-or-disable-pay).
![Edit Bank Account With Options](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bc7cce1dd8d6c9127e5f58d7bc58e7be/866aef1df58fdb971140b8b2f84b6566/edit-bank-account-with-options.png?fm=webp)
     * **Select at disbursement**. Choose this option to force your Payments Disbursers to select the funding account. A _funding account_ is the verified bank account from which a drawdown request for funds is made to complete the payments in a disbursement. To learn more, see [Create Disbursements](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payments-admin-guide/create-disbursements).
     * **One of your existing accounts**. Choose one of your company's existing funding accounts from the drop-down list. To learn how to add an account to the list, see [Add Funding Accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/add-funding-accounts).


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/edit-funding-accounts/)

title: Payor Setup Guide - Bulk Edit Funding Accounts
description: This guide shows users how to set up Procore Pay. | Bulk Edit Funding Accounts
